name: ExtensionFormularyItem_Code
title: R5: Codes that identify this formulary item (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `FormularyItem.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`FormularyItem.code` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `FormularyItem.code` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `FormularyItem.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `FormularyItem` is not mapped.
Element `FormularyItem.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Codes that identify this formulary item (new)
element.comment:
Element `FormularyItem.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `FormularyItem` is not mapped.
Element `FormularyItem.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Codes that identify this formulary item
element.definition: A code (or set of codes) that specify the product or service that is identified by this formulary item.
